name: AnyDev云研发
description: 云研发的Skill服务，为大模型赋予AnyDev环境的全生命周期管理能力：支持查询和智能推荐环境模板、一键创建云研发环境，能够远程执行命令、上传文件、自动化部署，也可以按需开启 SSH 连接、调整环境 CPU/内存/磁盘配置、锁定环境防止回收，以及监控运行状态和排查报错日志。
description_zh: 云研发的Skill服务，为大模型赋予AnyDev环境的全生命周期管理能力：支持查询和智能推荐环境模板、一键创建云研发环境，能够远程执行命令、上传文件、自动化部署，也可以按需开启 SSH 连接、调整环境 CPU/内存/磁盘配置、锁定环境防止回收，以及监控运行状态和排查报错日志。
description_en: The cloud-based development Skill service equips large models with full-lifecycle management capabilities for AnyDev environments. It supports querying and intelligently recommending environment templates and creating cloud development environments with a single click. It enables remote command execution, file uploads, and automated deployments, while also allowing users to initiate SSH connections on demand, adjust CPU, memory, and disk configurations, lock environments to prevent reclamation, monitor operational status, and troubleshoot error logs.
examples_zh: 帮我创建一个云研发环境
查询我的云研发环境列表
部署项目到云研发环境
examples_en: Open SSH to a cloud dev environment
Deploy project to a cloud dev environment
